description: README.md was modified earlier (added a Voice input section with macOS-verified / Linux-expected / Windows-best-guess setup); approve to commit alongside or as a separate commit.

items.before: README had Prerequisites / Download / Build / Layout / Working with a real backend / DevTools sections. No voice setup docs.
items.after: Added a 'Voice input' section between Layout and Working with a real backend. Three subsections: macOS (verified — brew install whisper-cpp ffmpeg + model download); Linux (expected to work, untested — pacman / Linuxbrew / source build); Windows (best guess, untested — prebuilt release + chocolatey ffmpeg, with explicit asks-for-an-issue if anyone tries it).
